settings.heading: WE CREATE PRO-GRADE GAMING GEAR FOR PLAYERS AROUND THE WORLD

settings.section_1_desc: Esports is about the will to fight back and the courage to turn the tide. We win games, defeat opponents, and push our limits. Until the final whistle, anything is possible. This drive is the spirit of AutoFull.
settings.section_1_desc2:
AutoFull - automatically fueled, fully fearless. "Automatically fueled" suggests that AutoFull is self-sustaining, always ready for action. "Fully fearless" implies that the product embodies complete confidence and strength, helping users face challenges without hesitation.  

We're born winners. The silver knight stands for strength, the red plume for courage. The knight with a sword shows our support for players chasing their dreams. The shield represents protection and a fearless spirit, aligning with our "BE YOUR OWN HERO" philosophy, making AutoFull a trusted partner for gamers.

settings.story_desc: AutoFull gaming chairs were initially designed for gamers seeking to boost their performance with top-notch gear while embracing a stylish and modern look. But after years of studying thousands of gamers and delving into their preferences and gaming setups, we realized that a great gaming chain needs to do more than enhance gameplay. It must also tackle the health issues that come from sitting for long periods.

Since 2014, we've been focused on creating products that meet professional esports standards, including gaming chairs, desks, and pods.
Our mission is to design a gaming chair that combines style with exceptional comfort, supporting any player in any position. It adapts to your movements, providing healthier and more comfortable support to keep you performing at your best.

settings.section_desc:
We've set up a lab to ensure our products meet top industry standards. Our designs are rooted in health research and ergonomics, focusing on advanced ergonomic technology and high-quality materials.
Our goal is to deliver professional, health-conscious esports products and solutions to gamers worldwide.

settings.subheading: International Chiropractic Association (ICA) Doctor of Chiropractic Care
settings.intro_desc: "As a spine expert, I believe the M6Pro+ chair's design is truly com mendable. Its massage system effectively relieves lower back  pressure, and the neck pillow provides essential support, reducing  strain on the spine. This chair is particularly beneficial for people who sit for extended periods, such as E-sports players, as it helps maintain proper spine health.”

settings.subheading: PhD Expert at International Society of Arthroscopy Knee Surgery and Orthopaedic Sports Medicine (ISAKOS)
settings.intro_desc: "The AutoFull M6's adjustable headrest, lumbar support, and open seat design adapt to different postures and body types. It maintaiIns the natural curve of the spine, reduces disc pressure, and providees excellent support to prevent lower back strain and other issues."

settings.section_desc: At AutoFull, our chairs are designed to elevate your entire gaming experience. We focus on every detail to blend comfort, style, and performance, keeping youimmersed and in control. With our 3-year Extended Warranty and dedicated customer supportwe're here to make sure you're always ready to win.
